subjects.description: A flatbed utility truck transporting a load of traffic signal heads stacked and secured on its bed, moving slowly along the road directly ahead of the ego vehicle.
subjects.appearance_details: Boxy traffic signal housings in dark green and black, mounted clusters with three-lamp configurations, secured with orange ratchet straps; the truck has a weathered white cab and a dusty metal flatbed with a reflective hazard placard.
subjects.relationship: The obstacle ahead that the ego vehicle is approaching and decelerating for; defines the driving scenario.
subjects.location: center, slightly right of frame, mid-to-far distance on the road ahead
subjects.orientation: Rear of the truck facing the camera, moving away from the ego vehicle
subjects.pose: Upright, traveling forward in the same lane as the ego vehicle
subjects.action: Driving slowly forward while carrying the traffic signal heads
subjects.state_changes: Maintains a slow speed throughout; the gap between it and the ego vehicle remains large as the ego decelerates.

subjects.description: A stacked cluster of traffic signal heads loaded on the truck's flatbed, with all lamps unlit except a glare reflecting off one red lens.
subjects.appearance_details: Standard three-section traffic signal housings, dark visors over each lens, dull unlit lamps; one upper red lens catches sunlight and produces a bright specular glare resembling an illuminated red light.
subjects.relationship: The notable cargo on the truck whose glaring red lamp mimics a stop signal, influencing the ego vehicle's behavior.
subjects.location: center frame on the truck's flatbed, mid distance
subjects.orientation: Lenses angled partly toward the camera
subjects.action: Static; one red lens reflects bright glare
subjects.state_changes: The red glare intensifies slightly as the sun angle shifts during approach.

background_setting: A two-lane suburban arterial road on a clear day, flanked by low commercial buildings, utility poles, and scattered roadside trees. The asphalt shows faded lane markings and light surface wear. The horizon is open with a pale blue sky and a few thin clouds, giving an ordinary daytime driving environment.

lighting.conditions: Bright daylight under a mostly clear sky
lighting.direction: Sunlight from the upper front-right, creating the specular glare on the red signal lens
lighting.shadows: Short, defined shadows cast slightly behind and to the left of vehicles and poles
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, high-key natural illumination with a sharp glint highlighting the red lamp against the otherwise unlit signal heads

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view dashcam framing with the road converging toward the truck; the load of signal heads draws the eye to the glaring red lens at mid-frame.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Neutral grays of asphalt, pale blue sky, muted greens of foliage and signal housings, punctuated by the vivid red glare and orange straps
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating roadside utility poles and the repeated three-lamp signal housings on the truck bed

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego (dashcam) motion that gradually slows to a stop
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the truck and its signal-head load ahead

context: Autonomous-driving / ADAS scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle cautiously decelerating to a stop behind a slow truck whose cargo signal lamp glare mimics a red stop light

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives forward at moderate speed, approaching the slow truck ahead carrying traffic signal heads.
The glare on one red signal lens becomes prominent; the ego vehicle begins to decelerate noticeably while still far from the truck.
The ego vehicle comes to a complete stop a long distance behind the truck and remains stationary, as if respecting the apparent red signal.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Black bold uppercase lettering on a reflective orange placard
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the rear of the truck, visible throughout the clip
text_and_signage_elements.context: Warns following traffic that the truck is moving slowly

segments.description: Ego vehicle moves forward toward the slow truck loaded with traffic signal heads ahead in the same lane.
segments.key_changes: Truck appears moderately ahead; ego still at travel speed.
segments.camera: Smooth forward motion at driving speed.

segments.description: The red lens glare stands out; the ego vehicle decelerates while remaining far behind the truck.
segments.key_changes: Visible reduction in speed; the gap to the truck stays large.

segments.description: The ego vehicle has come to a complete stop at a long distance from the truck and holds the stop for over two seconds.
segments.key_changes: Camera motion ceases entirely; scene becomes static.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows the road ahead with a slow flatbed truck carrying stacked traffic signal heads moving in the same lane; the ego vehicle approaches at moderate speed. By 0:01 a bright glare reflects off one upper red signal lens, resembling an illuminated red light, and the ego vehicle begins to slow down while still a long distance behind the truck. From 0:02 to 0:03 the deceleration continues smoothly, the gap to the truck remaining wide. By 0:03 the ego vehicle reaches a complete stop and from 0:03 to 0:05 it stays fully stationary, holding position as if obeying the apparent red signal, with the truck continuing slowly ahead.
audio_description: Ambient road noise of a moving vehicle, faint tire hum and wind, the engine note lowering as the car decelerates, and a soft settling sound as the vehicle comes to a stop; no speech or music.
